creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #6)

> Cc: Kirk because of comment about SU+J.

Sorry, I think I have created some confusion here. I was attempting to make clear, my intentions for switching back to gjournal, from SU. I realise those intentions are completely irrelevant here, and, if I was so inclined, I would create a separate PR for my SU speculation.

To be clear about the gjournal timeout problem, I do not see it on 15-CURRENT with separate data and journal providers.
